zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Owen Poultney Knight於1385年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓時，他的父親John de Poultney I25歲，母親Cicely Hamilton25歲。他於1413年與Margaret Le Walsh在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年4月6日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: Poultney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pountney
meanings: English: locative name from Poultney (Leics), which is recorded as Pontenei in 1086 and Pulteney in 1220. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pulta (genitive * Pultan) + Old English ēg ‘island, piece of dry ground in a fen’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Owen Poultney Knight was born in 1385, in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Poultney I, was 25 and his mother, Cicely Hamilton, was 25. He married Margaret Le Walsh in 1413, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 6 April 1467, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Owen Poultney Knight est né en 1385, à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Poultney I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Cicely Hamilton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Le Walsh en 1413, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1467, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

Er hat 1413 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Le Walsh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. April 1467 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Owen Poultney Knightが1385年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアミステルトンで生まれた時，父John de Poultney Iは25歳，母Cicely Hamiltonは25歳であった。1413年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでMargaret Le Walshと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年4月6日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Owen Poultney Knight(이)가 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Poultney I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicely Hamilton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1413년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 Margaret Le Walsh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 4월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Owen Poultney Knight nasceu em 1385, em Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Poultney I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Cicely Hamilton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Le Walsh em 1413, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Owen Poultney Knight родился в 1385 г. в местности мистиртон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Poultney I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Cicely Hamilton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Le Walsh в 1413 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 апреля 1467 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

Se casó con Margaret Le Walsh en 1413, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas.
